en_title: Staff at Fallout: New Vegas Developer Obsidian Reportedly Left Unsure How 'Huge List of Projects' Can Continue After Xbox Layoffs Hit Hard
cn_title: XBOX裁员后《辐射：新维加斯》开发商黑曜石忧项目难继
subtitle: 裁员冲击扩散
opus_summary: 据报道，XBOX裁员重创《辐射：新维加斯》开发商黑曜石，约60到70人离职。部分员工担心，工作室庞大的项目列表已难以继续推进。

paragraphs.en: Staff at Obsidian are reportedly concerned about the studio’s future projects after Microsoft’s latest Xbox layoffs.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，在微软最新一轮XBOX裁员之后，黑曜石员工开始担心工作室未来项目的去向。

paragraphs.en: Yesterday, Microsoft gaming boss Asha Sharma announced sweeping cuts, with 1,600 staff let go immediately and another 1,600 to follow over the current financial year. Four studios are leaving Xbox to new management, and one is now in consultation over its future.
paragraphs.cn: 昨天，微软游戏业务负责人Asha Sharma宣布大规模裁员，1600名员工立即离职，另外1600名员工将在本财年内陆续离职。四家工作室将离开XBOX，转交给新的管理方，另有一家工作室正在就未来进行磋商。

paragraphs.en: Kotaku reports that 60 to 70 people have been cut from Obsidian, the first-person RPG specialist behind Avowed, The Outer Worlds, Grounded, Pentiment, and Fallout: New Vegas. Some of those leaving are studio veterans.
paragraphs.cn: Kotaku报道称，黑曜石已有60到70人被裁。这家第一人称RPG专门工作室曾开发《宣誓》、《天外世界》、《禁闭求生》、《Pentiment》和《辐射：新维加斯》。部分离职者是工作室老员工。

paragraphs.en: One person told Kotaku they were unsure how Obsidian’s “huge list of projects” could continue after the cuts. Obsidian has not announced a new game following the commercial failure of Avowed and The Outer Worlds 2, but it is still supporting Grounded 2 in early access and working on DLC for The Outer Worlds 2.
paragraphs.cn: 一名人士告诉Kotaku，裁员后他们不确定黑曜石「大量项目」要如何继续推进。在《宣誓》和《天外世界2》商业表现失利之后，黑曜石尚未公布新游戏，但仍在支持抢先体验阶段的《禁闭求生2》，并开发《天外世界2》DLC。

paragraphs.en: Could Obsidian be moved to a new Fallout or The Elder Scrolls project, or shifted into support work elsewhere? Sharma has made clear that Xbox wants to double down on its biggest franchises. Bethesda boss Jill Braff told staff much the same.
paragraphs.cn: 黑曜石是否会被调去开发新的《辐射》或《上古卷轴》项目，或者转向支援其他团队？Sharma已经明确表示，XBOX希望加倍押注最大型的系列。贝塞斯达负责人Jill Braff也向员工传达了类似信息。

paragraphs.en: Braff said that “to best position Bethesda for future growth, we are shifting from a planning model primarily centered on what’s next for each independent studio to one that focuses on our strongest franchises and determining the content roadmap that best serves our players and Bethesda as a whole.”
paragraphs.cn: Braff表示：「为了让贝塞斯达更好地面向未来增长，我们正在从主要围绕各个独立工作室下一步做什么的规划模式，转向聚焦我们最强系列，并确定最能服务玩家和整个贝塞斯达的内容路线图。」

paragraphs.en: “From there, we’ll align the right talent, technology, and resources across the organization to deliver on those priorities,” Braff added.
paragraphs.cn: Braff补充说：「在此基础上，我们会在整个组织内协调合适的人才、技术和资源，以交付这些优先事项。」

paragraphs.en: Could Microsoft order a Fallout: New Vegas 2? Last year, Obsidian’s Marcus Morgan joked about the internet constantly asking for the next New Vegas. Fallout remains beloved, and Amazon’s TV series has only increased interest in the setting.
paragraphs.cn: 微软会不会让黑曜石制作《辐射：新维加斯2》？去年，黑曜石的Marcus Morgan曾调侃称，网上总有人追问下一部《新维加斯》。玩家依然热爱《辐射》，而Amazon剧集也进一步提升了外界对这一设定的兴趣。

paragraphs.en: There is also the mystery project from Tim Cain, the original creator of Fallout, who rejoined Obsidian in December 2025. Sharma said no publicly announced first-party games or projects had been cancelled, but Cain’s project has never been announced.
paragraphs.cn: 此外还有Tim Cain的神秘项目。这位《辐射》原作者在2025年12月重新加入黑曜石。Sharma表示，没有任何已经公开宣布的第一方游戏或项目被取消，但Cain的项目从未公开发布。
